name: Crockpot Meatball Stew
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix eggs with dried onions, bread crumbs, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper until thoroughly combined.
2. Form the meat mixture into meatballs about 1-1/2 to 2 inches in diameter.
3. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Brown the meatballs on all sides in hot oil.
4. Place potatoes, carrots, and celery in a crockpot (3-1/2 quart or larger).
5. Using a slotted spoon or spatula, place browned meatballs on top of the vegetables.
6. Quickly brown the onions and add them to the crockpot.
7. Pour the soup over everything; cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours.
8. Taste and adjust seasonings before serving.
